headline: Consumers Energy Connects Customers to Funds for Energy Bill Support; Nearly $11 Million in Assistance Available
summary: Across the state, Michiganders are feeling the impacts of rising costs. As families continue to navigate energy costs, Consumers Energy is reminding customers nearly $11 million in assistance is available.
